name: Kittentegy
short_description: Are you ready to accept the challenge and stand up for the delicious cheese? In the Kittentegy game, you have to stop the mice from stealing the cheese from the houses. Your strategic skills and decisive actions will be the key to victory!
detailed_description:
Are you ready to accept the challenge and stand up for the delicious cheese? In the Kittentegy game, you have to stop the mice from stealing the cheese from the houses. Your strategic skills and decisive actions will be the key to victory!

Build towers to stop the mice

The only way to keep the mice from getting to the cheese is to build towers. Place them so as to effectively block the path of the mice. But remember that towers have a limited life time, so build them wisely and with calculation.

Earn diamonds and upgrade towers

During the game, you will earn diamonds, which can be spent on increasing the number of coins at the beginning of the level, the number of starting cheese (lives), as well as a damage multiplier to increase the effectiveness of your defensive structures. For each destroyed mouse, you earn coins for which you can buy towers.



The game offers you the opportunity to develop your tactical skills. Build and upgrade your towers so that the rats don't have the slightest chance to get to the precious cheese.
The goal of the game is to survive as many waves as possible and set a record.

Features:
  • Online table of records;
  • Achievements;
  • Simple intuitive operation;
  • Nice graphics.
